mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT uor.role_id FROM sys_user_org_role uor INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = uor.role_id AND r.tenant_id = uor.tenant_id AND r.role_status = 1 AND r.del_flag = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role_org ro ON ro.tenant_id = uor.tenant_id AND ro.role_id = uor.role_id AND ro.org_id = uor.org_id WHERE uor.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND uor.user_id = #{userId} AND uor.org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY uor.role_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT uor.user_id FROM sys_user_org_role uor INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = uor.user_id AND u.user_status = 1 AND u.del_flag = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user_tenant sut ON sut.user_id = uor.user_id AND sut.tenant_id = uor.tenant_id AND sut.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = uor.role_id AND r.tenant_id = uor.tenant_id AND r.role_status = 1 AND r.del_flag = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role_org ro ON ro.tenant_id = uor.tenant_id AND ro.role_id = uor.role_id AND ro.org_id = uor.org_id WHERE uor.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND uor.org_id = #{orgId} AND uor.role_id IN
#{roleId}
